name: Metoprolol Succinate And Amlodipine Besylate Tablets IP
about: Metoprolol Succinate And Amlodipine Besylate Tablets IP is a combination medication used to treat high blood pressure. It contains two active ingredients: Metoprolol Succinate and Amlodipine Besylate. Metoprolol Succinate is a beta-blocker that works by slowing down the heart rate and relaxing blood vessels, while Amlodipine Besylate is a calcium channel blocker that helps to widen blood vessels to improve blood flow. These tablets come in a physical form of tablets and are stored in a dry and cool place. The dosage guidelines should be followed as per the doctors suggestion for best results. This medicine is manufactured in India and comes in packaging of 10*10 tablets per box. This medication is a general medicine type and is suitable for those who suffer from high blood pressure. It is an effective treatment for hypertension and can help to lower blood pressure levels.
